nodes.text: <style> * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; } body { background-color: var(--color--deep-black); color: var(--color--light-paragraph); font-family: var(--font--body); font-size: var(--text--body); -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; overflow-x: hidden; } img { max-width: 100%; display: block; } p { color: var(--color--light-paragraph); } h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { font-family: var(--font--heading); font-weight: var(--weight--bold); color: var(--color--white); letter-spacing: -0.03125rem; } h1 { font-size: var(--heading--h1-size); line-height: var(--heading--h1-lh); } h2 { font-size: var(--heading--h2-size); line-height: var(--heading--h2-lh); } h3 { font-size: var(--heading--h3-size); line-height: var(--heading--h3-lh); } h4 { font-size: var(--heading--h4-size); line-height: var(--heading--h4-lh); } h5 { font-size: var(--heading--h5-size); line-height: var(--heading--h5-lh); } h6 { font-size: var(--heading--h6-size); line-height: var(--heading--h6-lh); } a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .real-ceremonies_controls::before, .real-ceremonies_controls::after { content: ''; } .real-ceremonies_controls::before, .real-ceremonies_controls::after { position: absolute; width: 3rem; height: 3rem; pointer-events: none; background-color: transparent; z-index: 1; } .real-ceremonies_controls::before { top: -3rem; right: 0; background: radial-gradient( circle at 0% 0%, transparent 3rem, var(--color--deep-black) 3.1rem ); } .real-ceremonies_controls::after { bottom: 0; left: -3rem; background: radial-gradient( circle at 0% 0%, transparent 3rem, var(--color--deep-black) 3.1rem ); } .js-enabled [gsap-reveal]:not(.is-revealed), .js-enabled [gsap-split]:not(.is-revealed), .js-enabled [gsap-stagger]:not([gsap-group]):not(.is-revealed) { opacity: 0; will-change: opacity, transform; } .js-enabled [gsap-stagger]:not([gsap-group]):not(.is-revealed) { transform: translateY(1.875rem); } .js-enabled [gsap-reveal]:not(.is-revealed) { transform: translateY(2.5rem); } .js-enabled [gsap-reveal='up']:not(.is-revealed) { transform: translateY(2.5rem); } .js-enabled [gsap-reveal='down']:not(.is-revealed) { transform: translateY(-2.5rem); } .js-enabled [gsap-reveal='left']:not(.is-revealed) { transform: translateX(-2.5rem); } .js-enabled [gsap-reveal='right']:not(.is-revealed) { transform: translateX(2.5rem); } [gsap-stagger].is-revealed, [gsap-reveal].is-revealed, [gsap-split].is-revealed { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, 0); } .button::before { content: ''; } .button::before { position: absolute; top: 0; left: -100%; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient( 120deg, transparent, var(--color--white-15), transparent ); transition: left 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); pointer-events: none; } .button:hover::before { left: 100%; } .button::after { display: none; } .inspiration_content-column::before { content: ''; } .inspiration_content-column::before { position: absolute; top: 0; left: -2rem; right: -100vw; bottom: 0; background-color: var(--color--surface-6); border-radius: var(--radius--large) 0 0 var(--radius--large); z-index: -1; } .inspiration_grid[data-wf--two-column--variant='reversed'] { grid-template-columns: 0.75fr 1fr; } .inspiration_grid[data-wf--two-column--variant='reversed'] .inspiration_content-column { padding: var(--space-96) 0rem var(--space-96) var(--space-16); align-items: flex-start; text-align: left; } .inspiration_grid.is-reversed .inspiration_content-column::before, .inspiration_grid[data-wf--two-column--variant='reversed'] .inspiration_content-column::before { left: -100vw; right: -2rem; border-radius: 0 var(--radius--large) var(--radius--large) 0; } .inspiration_grid[data-wf--two-column--variant='reversed'] .inspiration_image-column { order: 2; position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .gallery_item:hover .gallery_img { transform: scale(1.05); } .venue_card:hover .venue_img { transform: scale(1.05); } .venue_card:hover .venue_details-link { opacity: 0.8; } .journey_background-wrapper { --mask-inner: 100%; --mask-outer: 100%; } .js-enabled .journey_background-wrapper { --mask-inner: 0%; --mask-outer: 30%; } #confetti-canvas { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 10; } .events_grid::after { content: ''; } .events_grid::after { position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; left: 50%; width: 1px; background-color: var(--color--white-8); transform: translateX(-50%); } .events_list-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid var(--color--white-8); } .team-magic_item:hover .team-magic_img { transform: scale(1.08); } .footer_component::before { content: ''; } .footer_component::before { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient( to right, var(--color--gold-0) 0%, var(--color--gold-20)) 50%, var(--color--gold-0) 100% ); } .footer_top::after { content: ''; } .footer_top::after { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient( to right, var(--color--gold-0) 0%, var(--color--gold-20)) 50%, var(--color--gold-0) 100% ); } .footer_bottom::before { content: ''; } .footer_bottom::before { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient( to right, var(--color--gold-0) 0%, var(--color--gold-20)) 50%, var(--color--gold-0) 100% ); } @media screen and (max-width: 991px) { .real-ceremonies_controls::before { top: auto; bottom: 0; right: -1.45rem; left: auto; width: 1.5rem; height: 1.5rem; background: var(--color--deep-black); mask-image: radial-gradient( circle at 100% 0%, transparent 1.45rem, black 1.5rem ); -webkit-mask-image: radial-gradient( circle at 100% 0%, transparent 1.45rem, black 1.5rem ); clip-path: polygon(-1% -1%, 101% -1%, 101% 101%); } .real-ceremonies_controls::after { top: auto; bottom: 0; left: -1.45rem; right: auto; width: 1.5rem; height: 1.5rem; background: var(--color--deep-black); mask-image: radial-gradient( circle at 0% 0%, transparent 1.45rem, black 1.5rem ); -webkit-mask-image: radial-gradient( circle at 0% 0%, transparent 1.45rem, black 1.5rem ); clip-path: polygon(-1% -1%, 101% -1%, -1% 101%); } } @media (min-width: 992px) { .gallery_item-title { font-size: var(--text--display-lg); } .gallery_item.is-large:nth-child(4) { grid-column: span 1; aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; } .gallery_item.is-large:nth-child(4) .gallery_overlay { align-items: flex-start; text-align: left; } } @media (max-width: 991px) { .inspiration_grid[data-wf--two-column--variant='reversed'] { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .inspiration_grid[data-wf--two-column--variant='reversed'] .inspiration_image-column { order: 0; margin-left: calc(-1 * var(--space--padding-global)); margin-right: calc(-1 * var(--space--padding-global)); width: calc(100% + (2 * var(--space--padding-global))); } .inspiration_grid[data-wf--two-column--variant='reversed'] .inspiration_content-column { padding: var(--space-32) 0; align-items: flex-start; text-align: left; } .inspiration_content-column::before { left: calc(-1 * var(--space--padding-global)); right: calc(-1 * var(--space--padding-global)); border-radius: 0; } .inspiration_grid.is-reversed .inspiration_content-column::before, .inspiration_grid[data-wf--two-column--variant='reversed'] .inspiration_content-column::before { left: calc(-1 * var(--space--padding-global)); right: calc(-1 * var(--space--padding-global)); border-radius: 0; } .inspiration_image-column[data-wf--two-column--variant='reversed'] { order: 0; margin-left: calc(-1 * var(--space--padding-global)); margin-right: calc(-1 * var(--space--padding-global)); width: calc(100% + (2 * var(--space--padding-global))); } .inspiration_content-column[data-wf--two-column--variant='reversed'] { padding: var(--space-32) 0; align-items: flex-start; text-align: left; } .inspiration_content-column::before { left: calc(-1 * var(--space--padding-global)); right: calc(-1 * var(--space--padding-global)); border-radius: 0; } .inspiration_content-column.is-reversed::before, .inspiration_content-column[data-wf--two-column--variant='reversed']::before { left: calc(-1 * var(--space--padding-global)); right: calc(-1 * var(--space--padding-global)); border-radius: 0; } .gallery_item.is-large:first-child .gallery_overlay { align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end; text-align: center; } .events_grid::after { display: none; } } .venue-category_card:hover .venue-category_img { transform: scale(1.05); } .filter_search:focus-within { border-color: var(--color--gold-40); } .venue_card.is-listing:hover .venue_card-img.is-listing { transform: scale(1.05); } @media screen and (max-width: 1200px) { .venues_grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); } } </style>
